snippet.textOriginal: I really love how the Spotify algorithm recommends music. The Discover Weekly playlist has been my go-to for finding new indie bands for years now. It has a high hit rate compared to Apple Music.
The algorithm seems to have gotten worse lately. It keeps recommending songs that are already in my daily rotation. I hope they fix this because I'm stuck in a loop of the same 5 artists.
Has anyone else noticed that Spotify Wrapped recommendations are completely off this year? The songs recommended in my wrapped mix are pop songs I skipped within 10 seconds of listening.
Spotify's AI DJ is actually quite good at picking music that fits my mood. I was skeptical but it played a few old school tracks that brought back great memories. Nice feature!
Is there a way to reset my Spotify taste profile? My daily mix is recommending music I listened to for a school project and now it has completely ruined my discovery queue.
